heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 277d–46 Authorization of appropriations
text: There is authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out sections 277d–43 to 277d–46 of this title. Such sums shall remain available until expended.
notes: Amendments2004— substituted “such sums as may be necessary” for “a total of $156,000,000 for fiscal years 2001 through 2005”.Pub. L. 108–425
amendments: Amendments2004— substituted “such sums as may be necessary” for “a total of $156,000,000 for fiscal years 2001 through 2005”.Pub. L. 108–425
